phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the best bagels in Montréal
phrases.text_local: C'est où les meilleurs bagels de Montréal ?
phrases.pronunciation: say OO lay may-YUR BAY-gel duh mon-ray-AHL
phrases.cultural_note: Montréal bagels are boiled in honey water then wood-fired — smaller, sweeter, and denser than New York bagels. Fairmount and St-Viateur bakeries have been rivals for decades.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a sesame bagel with cream cheese
phrases.text_local: Un bagel au sésame avec du fromage à la crème, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: un BAY-gel oh say-ZAHM ah-VEK doo fro-MAHZH ah lah KREM seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: Freshly baked bagels from the wood-fired oven are sold all night long at both St-Viateur and Fairmount. The neighbourhood smells incredible.

responses.english: Right away! Do you want it hot?
responses.phonetic: U(N) buh-ZHEL oh seh-ZAM ah-VEK dyoo froh-MAZH ah lah KREM, seel voo PLEH
responses.local: Tout de suite ! Vous le voulez chaud ?

phrases.intent_en: Ask for directions to Bernard Avenue
phrases.cultural_note: Avenue Bernard is Mile End's charming main street with indie boutiques, coffee shops, and the legendary Café Olimpico frequented by locals for decades.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the neighbourhood's artistic scene
phrases.text_local: C'est vrai que le Mile End, c'est le quartier des artistes ?
phrases.pronunciation: say VREH kuh luh myl END say luh kar-tee-YAY day zar-TEEST
phrases.cultural_note: Mile End has been home to artists, musicians, and writers for decades. Arcade Fire recorded their debut album here. Many studios and galleries exist on side streets.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Jewish deli is
phrases.text_local: La charcuterie juive traditionnelle, c'est dans quel coin ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah shar-koo-tuh-REE zhweev trah-dee-syo-NEL say dahn kel KWAN
phrases.cultural_note: Mile End has deep Jewish roots — several traditional Jewish delis and bakeries remain from its early 20th-century immigrant community.

responses.english: It's on Saint-Laurent, near Prince-Arthur Street.
responses.phonetic: lah shar-koo-tuh-REE ZHWEEV trah-dee-syo-NEL, say DAHN kel KWAN
responses.local: C'est sur Saint-Laurent, près de la rue Prince-Arthur.
